_comment: Canonical Assistant AI model. Fast-path AI for simple tasks — shares the full tool set with the Primary AI but uses a smaller, lower-latency model.
name: AssistantAI

agent_mode.description: The current AI mode (operator_bound, operator_not_bound, etc.)

content.description: The primary text output of the AI.

tool_calls.description: Optional list of tool calls initiated by the Assistant AI.
